items.title: SpaceX Trounces Boeing and Lockheed as Space Force Hands Out $13 Billion in Launch Contracts
items.description: There are a lot of space company winners in this new space launch contract, but only two losers: Boeing and Lockheed Martin.

items.title: Woodward (WWD) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
items.description: Aerospace and defense company Woodward (NASDAQ:WWD) will be reporting earnings tomorrow afternoon. Here’s what to expect.
